clauses_walked.obligation: 10-year initial term from opening date; 1 renewal of 10 years
6.5% of Gross Receipts weekly via ACH
1% Corporate Ad + 4% National Media + 0% Coop (cap 6% total)
Must complete Phases 1-3; must maintain 3 trained employees at all times; replacement training at $2,500
Full compliance with System Standards in Manual (412 pages); maintain meat case at full capacity; use only authorized products
Immediately notify Area Director and Operations; Franchisor may control crisis response including closing restaurant; franchisee reimburses all costs; indemnification applies
Must timely pay all vendor/supplier amounts; past-due amounts constitute breach
CGL $1M/$2M; property; business interruption (covers lost royalties to Company); EPLI $500K; workers comp. Must name Company and JMFS as additional insureds.
16 non-curable defaults including abandonment (2 days), royalty understatement (3%+ twice), report failures (2x in 12 months), 3+ non-compliance in 12 months, cross-default
Avg monthly (royalty+ad) × lesser of 36 or remaining months. If <12 months operation, use system average. If unapproved closure, use pre-closure period. In addition to other damages.
Stop operations; de-identify; pay liquidated damages; assign lease; return materials; comply with non-compete; cease Online Presence; sell assets to Company at option
Company approval (sole and absolute discretion); $15K fee + $5K grand opening; transferee signs then-current FA; general release; right of first refusal 15 business days
No Competitive Business (25%+ sandwich revenue) anywhere
No Competitive Business within MSA or 10-mile radius for 2 years
Informal meeting → mediation → binding arbitration, all in Monmouth County NJ. Exceptions: Mark disputes, injunctive relief, covenant enforcement, indemnification.
New Jersey law. NJ Franchise Practices Act applies only if restaurant in NJ and jurisdictional scope independently met.
Franchisee indemnifies Company, affiliates, officers, directors, employees against all claims from restaurant operations. Joint and several. Includes enforcement costs.
POS upgrades/updates not to exceed $50,000 during FA term. No limit on frequency.
Investment required for equipment, supplies, remodeling, upgrades not to exceed $150,000 during FA term.

obligations: Guarantees punctual payment and performance of all FA obligations
Personally bound by and liable for breach of every FA provision (monetary and non-monetary)
Waives: acceptance notice, demand notice, protest notice, right to require action against Franchisee first, all legal/equitable defenses
Continues for term of FA and thereafter as provided
Not diminished by extensions, credits, or indulgences granted to Franchisee
guaranty_exhibit_c2.spousal_requirement: Spouse must also sign as Guarantor

key_provisions: Lease rider requires franchisee to assign lease to Franchisor upon termination
Franchisor has right to cure franchisee's lease defaults
Franchisor has right to enter premises for de-identification
